video_goal: Introduce an abstract AI research idea in a visually memorable way without feeling corporate.
audience: Curious technical viewers who enjoy beautiful explainers.
source_material: Explain an invisible machine that turns messy prompts into coordinated specialist agents and a polished result. Make it elegant, cinematic, and strange in a good way. This should stay image-first, with no fake UI or software demo.
visual_style: editorial science-fiction diagrams and cinematic stills
